description: Comfort and style rolled into one - that's playboy for you. Revel in the comfort of flip flops with this stylish pair from Playboy. Upper Wide twill fabric straps with brand name embroidered on the medial strap and, striped and padded on the lateral one Twill cushioned fabric toe separator to hold the foot in place with much ease Soft, cushioned textured rubber footbed with brand logo partially printed Oustole Single piece cushioned rubber footbed and outsole for all-day comfort Brand bunny face logo-styled lugs throughout the footbed for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
